summary: The ERP dashboard provides a 'Quick Link' option, allowing users to add frequently used functionalities for quick access. For example, a fee clerk might add the 'Collect Fee' option to their quick links for daily use. These quick links are user-specific and can be updated by each user according to their daily tasks.
steps: Identify frequently used options (e.g., Collect Fee).
Add the desired option to the 'Quick Link' section.
important_notes: N number of links can be updated according to each user.
questions: How can I add a quick link to my dashboard?
Can I customize the quick links on my ERP dashboard?
Are quick links specific to each user?
